criteria.label: Define hallucination and give a concrete example.
criteria.example: Invented journal article—model cites 'Smith 2019' that does not exist.

criteria.label: List three limitation categories (knowledge, math, context, etc.).
criteria.example: Hallucination, knowledge cutoff, context window bounds.

criteria.label: Propose one mitigation for a limitation on a work task.
criteria.example: For revenue figures: paste the official table and ask for sums via a short Python snippet I execute locally.

criteria.label: Distinguish a limitation from a missing feature (tools, connectors).
criteria.example: Limitation: may hallucinate citations. Missing feature: no ERP connector unless I build tool use—asking 'our Q3 revenue' without data is not a bug, it's absent context.
